Sonam.subject: Node.js Developer role at Suffescom Solutions
Sonam.body:
Hi,
I noticed Suffescom is looking for immediate joiners passionate about building dynamic apps — that's exactly the pace I thrive in. Over the past 2.2 years, I've shipped production apps using Node.js, TypeScript, and Redux, with Git keeping things smooth across teams. I'm comfortable jumping into onsite roles and love environments that put people first. My resume's attached — happy to chat more about how I can contribute to your team.

Sonam
https://sonammalik.in/
linkedin.com/in/sonammalik17
github.com/SonamMalik17

Sonam.subject: Full Stack Developer role at The Sage Next
Sonam.body:
Hi,
I saw The Sage Next is hiring for a Full Stack role requiring Next.js and Tailwind — I've used both building scalable web apps over the last 2.2 years. I'm comfortable with the MERN stack too, and I've shipped projects where clean UI and performance mattered. I'm excited by the chance to work with a team that values both design and code. Resume's attached — happy to discuss how I can help.

Sonam

Sonam.subject: MERN Stack Developer role with Infolexus Solutions
Sonam.body:
Hi,
I noticed Infolexus is hiring a MERN Stack Developer for a client in Coimbatore — I'm interested and ready to join quickly. I've built apps using MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, and Node.js, with strong Git workflows and REST API experience. I also bring solid JavaScript, HTML, and CSS skills from shipping responsive, production-ready apps. Resume attached — keen to explore this further.

Sonam
